mapper.select:
select count(*) from company where 1=1
and (com_name like concat('%', #{keyword},'%') or biz_no like concat('%', #{keyword},'%'))

select com_id, com_name, biz_no FROM company WHERE 1=1
and (com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY com_name ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: insert into company (com_name, com_ceo, biz_no, com_tel, com_logo) values (#{comName}, #{comCeo}, #{bizNo}, #{comTel}, #{comLogo})
